name: 𝙋𝙐𝙍-𝟬𝟯 Δ 𝙍𝙊𝘽𝙊𝙏 𝙆𝙄𝙏𝙏𝙀𝙉
description:
Your assistance robot cat is right here! And she wants to help you with anything, will you let her in?

Proxy Allowed!

Animation by: FUCH!

‎‎

PUR-03 was created around the 80s by mysterious companies that are known for high-technology androids. But she was retired, and they decided to let her be on her own and didn't care what would happen to her. She struggles to find a place to live in a world where androids look modern and smarter than her.

‎‎‎

Note: I'll be honest with y'all, she's so hot and cute when I saw her. Like, bro... is there any reason why they make her look like that? I mean, I feel like they may put her in E6. Anyway, I don't know whether I should add a furry tag or not. I'll be waiting for the answer...
creator: fennec17
